name: Zoom
description: Zoom is the world's leading video communications platform. Beyond video meetings, it offers webinars, phone system (Zoom Phone), asynchronous video, team chat, and an AI Companion — making it a full unified communications suite.
cons: Gets expensive with Zoom Phone add-ons
use_cases: You run frequent external meetings where guests join without an account and need a link-and-click experience that just works
Your team hosts webinars and virtual events with hundreds of attendees and needs Zoom Webinars' registration, Q&A, and recording tools
You want to replace your phone system with Zoom Phone and consolidate calling, messaging, and video into a single app
Your organisation needs AI Companion to auto-generate meeting summaries, action items, and transcripts without a separate notetaking tool
